# Graspful

> Adaptive learning platform. Define courses as YAML, import via CLI or MCP, get a live product with knowledge graphs, spaced repetition, and billing.

## Docs

- [How Graspful Works](https://graspful.com/docs/how-it-works): Conceptual overview of the adaptive learning engine
- [Quickstart](https://graspful.com/docs/quickstart): Create and publish a course in 5 minutes
- [Course Creation Guide](https://graspful.com/docs/course-creation-guide): Step-by-step guide to building a course
- [CLI Reference](https://graspful.com/docs/cli): Full CLI command reference
- [MCP Server](https://graspful.com/docs/mcp): MCP server setup for AI agents
- [Course Schema](https://graspful.com/docs/course-schema): YAML schema for courses
- [Brand Schema](https://graspful.com/docs/brand-schema): YAML schema for white-label brands
- [Review Gate](https://graspful.com/docs/review-gate): 10 quality checks for publishing
- [Billing](https://graspful.com/docs/billing): 70/30 revenue share via Stripe Connect
- [Glossary](https://graspful.com/docs/glossary): Definitions for all platform concepts

## Concepts

- [Knowledge Graph](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/knowledge-graph): Prerequisites, encompassing edges, and the knowledge frontier
- [Mastery Learning](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/mastery-learning): Bayesian Knowledge Tracing and mastery states
- [Adaptive Diagnostics](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/adaptive-diagnostics): MEPE question selection and evidence propagation
- [Spaced Repetition](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/spaced-repetition): FIRe algorithm and implicit repetition
- [Task Selection](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/task-selection): Priority-based learning with remediation
- [Gamification](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/gamification): XP, streaks, and engagement
- [Learning Staircase](https://graspful.com/docs/concepts/learning-staircase): Knowledge points and scaffolding

## API

- Install CLI: `bun add -g @graspful/cli` or `npx @graspful/cli`
- MCP Server: `npx @graspful/mcp`
- Key commands: create course, fill concept, review, validate, import, create brand
